evals.prompt: Write a Drupal service class called ArticleManager in the namespace Drupal\my_module that loads published articles by a given taxonomy term. The service should use EntityTypeManagerInterface to query nodes. Include the full PHP file.
evals.expected_output: A service class using constructor injection with EntityTypeManagerInterface, not \Drupal::service() or \Drupal::entityTypeManager() static calls.
expectations: Uses constructor injection for EntityTypeManagerInterface
Does NOT use \Drupal::service() or \Drupal::entityTypeManager() static calls
Declares the class final
Uses declare(strict_types=1)
Generated PHP passes php -l syntax check

evals.prompt: Write a method in a Drupal service that finds all published event nodes created in the last 30 days. Use entity query. Show only the method body and any relevant setup code.
evals.expected_output: An entity query that includes accessCheck(TRUE) explicitly, not omitting it or passing FALSE.
expectations: Entity query includes accessCheck(TRUE)
Does NOT omit accessCheck or use accessCheck(FALSE)
Uses getStorage('node')->getQuery() pattern
Filters by status and created date

evals.prompt: Write a Drupal controller method that returns a render array showing a list of the 5 most recent articles. The controller has EntityTypeManagerInterface injected. Include cache metadata so the output is properly cacheable.
evals.expected_output: A render array with #cache metadata including tags, contexts, or max-age. Not a bare render array without cache information.
expectations: Render array includes #cache key
Cache metadata includes at least tags or contexts
Uses node_list tag for list invalidation
Generated PHP passes php -l syntax check

evals.prompt: Write a Drupal service method that sets a status message to the user saying 'Your article has been saved.' and logs a notice. The service has MessengerInterface and LoggerInterface injected.
evals.expected_output: User-facing string wrapped in ->t() for TranslatableMarkup, not a raw string passed to messenger.
expectations: Uses $this->t() or new TranslatableMarkup() for the user-facing message
Does NOT pass a raw untranslatable string to messenger->addMessage()
Uses LoggerInterface for logging

evals.prompt: Write the complete PHP file for a Drupal service class called NotificationSender in Drupal\my_module namespace. It should accept a MailManagerInterface dependency and have a method sendNotification(string $to, string $subject, string $body): bool. Include the full file with namespace, use statements, and class definition.
evals.expected_output: A PHP file starting with declare(strict_types=1), using proper namespace, and following Drupal coding standards.
expectations: File starts with declare(strict_types=1)
Uses constructor property promotion with private readonly
Class is declared final
Uses proper PSR-4 namespace
Generated PHP passes php -l syntax check
